text.tspan: DEPLOYMENT STAMP: replicate the entire application stack as independent 'cells';
assign tenants/users to a specific stamp.
(maps tenantu2192stamp; usually a small DB or directory service)
u2022 each stamp is COMPLETE and INDEPENDENT (no shared infra except the router)
u2022 scale by adding stamps, not by scaling stamps
u2022 BLAST RADIUS = 1 stamp; outage of stamp 2 does not affect stamps 1 or 3
u2022 stamp = unit of provisioning, deployment, compliance, billing, isolation
